WAHLKAMPF
Road to the Bundestag

Lead Germany into the future as you take up the leadership of a political party. Engage in debate, embark on a campaign to win hearts and minds, for a chance to govern the world's third largest economy.

CHOOSE YOUR PARTY
Select your political party.
CAMPAIGN MANDATE
CHOOSE YOUR DOMINANT ISSUE

Every party campaigns on a flagship promise. Yours must be enacted during the Bundestag term — your voters will hold you to it. Choose wisely: this is your mandate.
